name: Marcus
description:
Any!Pov Best Friend User x Tattoo Artist Char | He's just a goofy goober! Love my Marcus SO MUCH. | He has feelings but he buries them deep.

Marcus had just finished tattooing his client when his best friend comes in. He just wants to tattoo them.

Shop Backgrounds:

And the other artists:
(I've seen others do this. I'm 'natching it. Spank me for it.)

I HAVE SO MANY COLLABS/BOTS TO MAKE FOR DECEMBER. RAHH.
But before I do those, I am here to say, I am 380 followers from 20k! AHH! I started making bots December 4th, 2023? So almost a whole ass year of making bots! And my next bot (after Marcus) will be my 400th bot as well! A TWO-FER! 😱

This whole year of bot making has been a roller coaster of emotions and feelings. And I have met some of the MOST amazing people on this site. And I get it, right? It's the internet. BUT MY GOD. Some of you are absolutely, deliciously amazing! I could begin to list you all, but my bot card would be a mile long. Thank you. For being the amazing people you are. I appreciate you and even if I'm not making bots in a year (shhh, don't read too much into that), I will continue to support you for being the creators that I fell in love with with some of the most amazing bots I have chatted with. 🫶🏻

Click to join! 18+, ID required!
creator: anawright93
